name: com.gameframex.unity.coroutine
description:
GameFrameX Coroutine — Unity coroutine management package. Provides centralized start/stop control for coroutines with thread-safe tracking (ConcurrentDictionary), bulk StopAllCoroutines, and WaitForEndOfFrame callback helpers for frame-precise execution. Docs: https://gameframex.doc.alianblank.com

GameFrameX Coroutine — Unity 协程管理功能包。提供协程的集中启动/停止控制，使用 ConcurrentDictionary 实现线程安全追踪，支持批量 StopAllCoroutines 及 WaitForEndOfFrame 回调辅助，实现帧精确执行。文档：https://gameframex.doc.alianblank.com
